reviews.comment:
Buena atencion, la gente no respeta la circulacion en los lugares de carga de combustible  hace muchos años que no mejoran la carga en el surtidor que esta contra el parque da la impresion que el ACA esta ausente

(Translated by Google)
Good service, people don't respect traffic at fuel stations. They haven't improved the fueling process at the pump located next to the park for many years. It gives the impression that the ACA is absent.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17556132376650976621/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNJajVqamNREAE

reviews.comment:
Mira, no te pido que tengas los baños abiertos el día de la peregrinación. Pero al menos tené la delicadeza de poner un cartel así la gente no viene ilusionada con que va a encontrar un baño.. al menos eso...

(Translated by Google)
Look, I'm not asking you to have the restrooms open on the day of the pilgrimage. But at least have the decency to put up a sign so people don't come expecting to find a restroom... at least that much...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17556132376650976621/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNJNV8yajdRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Los baños bien, podrían estar mejor,  el costo para invitados $140 considero un poco elevado si son 4personas más el auto.  Hay que cuidar el lugar entre todos eso si. La cancha de fútbol no está bueno el campo,  pasto alto y te podes romper en un pique.  Igual es muy recomendable para pasar el día en flia.

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms are okay, but they could be better. The $140 guest fee seems a bit high for four people plus a car. Everyone needs to take care of the place, though. The soccer field isn't great; the grass is long and you could easily get hurt. Even so, it's highly recommended for a family day out.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17556132376650976621/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR3OExtdHpBRRAB
